results.rendered_html:
triṇava (von triṇavan) adj.
1〉 aus drei Mal neun (Gliedern) bestehend (so v. a. saptaviṃśa)ḥ stoma  VS. 10,14 . 13,58 .  TS. 5,2,6,3 .  TBR. 2,2,4,6 .  PAÑCAV. BR. 3,1 .  ŚAT. BR. 12,2,4,13 . 3,1,6 . 13,4,4,1 .
— 2〉 mit dem Triṇava — Stoma verbunden: bṛhaspati  VS. 29,60 . uktha  ŚAT. BR. 13,5,4,20 . ahan 7,1,10 . savana  ŚĀṄKH. ŚR. 16,23,11 . 12 .
